name: Grade 4 Homestead Lab — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 4 pathway for using evidence, multi-step processes, and clear explanations through Homestead Lab. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 4 knowledge and transferable skills in using evidence, multi-step processes, and clear explanations through Homestead Lab.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: using evidence, multi-step processes, and clear explanations through Homestead Lab
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about using evidence, multi-step processes, and clear explanations through Homestead Lab and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about using evidence, multi-step processes, and clear explanations through Homestead Lab, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.

successCriteria: The learner completes a grade 4 task connected to using evidence, multi-step processes, and clear explanations through Homestead Lab.
The learner uses relevant evidence, vocabulary, or a model to explain reasoning.
The learner revises, seeks feedback, or identifies a specific next step.
